name: mining
description: /mining — lens-driven DIVERGENCE + connect-driven CONVERGENCE + tidy-driven ORGANIZE workflow as a slash command. Sibling 3rd pillar to /domain (snapshot · log · MINING). File pair — <NAME>.mining.md + <NAME>.mining.tape. 0.4.0 — **auto-saturate by default**: `<lens>` and `connect` rounds auto-loop until depletion without per-round user confirmation (cap 5 inner rounds per invocation, 🔄 re-run hint if not yet depleted) AND new verb `auto` = full pipeline (drains divergence saturate → convergence saturate → tidy --depth=light in one user invocation; the '사이클마다 물어보지 않고 고갈시까지' path). Bundled lens catalogue (extensible `~/.sidecar/lens/<name>.md`): **same-formula** · **ouroboros** (self-reference → goal closure) · **dimensional** · **tension** · **combinatorial** · **custom**. Verbs (13): bare (status with auto-suggest tidy at ≥10 cycles & ≥500 lines) · `<lens>` (divergence saturate-loop) · `append` · `cycle new` · `depletion` · `tree` · `connect`/`edges` (convergence saturate-loop) · `connect <a> <b>` · `graph` · `saturate` (alias of connect since 0.4.0) · `auto` (full pipeline · 0.4.0) · `tidy`/`consolidate` [`--depth=light|full`] · `squash`. Active-domain only (commons @D g58). Cycles append-only; tidy rearranges but never discards (chronological index table preserves order). Derived from demiurge RTSC's 15-cycle organic emergence + Cycle 15 phase-grouping reorg. NL triggers — '/mining', '/mining <lens>', '/mining auto', 'mining tree', 'mining connect', 'mining graph', 'mining saturate', 'mining tidy', 'mining consolidate', 'mining squash', 'lens 발산', '점잇기', '정리', 'phase 그룹', '마이닝 정리', '고갈시까지', '한번에 끝까지', '사이클마다 물어보지 말고'.
